text:
I think it shows most of us don't know how PayPal works. Let me help some:
1. You have to download a PayPal app and sign up
2. Link your Bank-Card with the account 
3. Since local currency is not supported; hence they've stipulated that currency conversion charges may apply. This means,  whilst paying, PayPal will therefore, convert local currency to dollars
4. When paying, you'll see the bill in both local and international approved currency, using a normal international or regulated bank rate. However, the transaction shall be made in dollars 

NB: This is how I know and understand it!
